David confides in Sarah that he worries Shona will never return to normal, and Nina calls to see Asha and gently suggests that she can do much better than Corey

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Belle is upset when Paddy confronts her for starting a family feud and is also annoyed to hear Paddy and Marlon talking about her and Jamie behind their backs. As Harriet heads off to a religious retreat, Dawn tries to calm a paranoid Will, who refuses to listen and places an urgent furtive phone call

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Dawn admonishes Will, reminding him what happened last time he brought a gun into the house, while Cain notices the church door has been left open and finds Harriet inside sobbing. When Amy arrives at the Woolpack for her pizza tasting night she's hurt to discover Marlon has also invited others, and things get worse when Tracy arrives as there's an obvious frostiness between the two girls

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Another chance to see the feature-length first episode of the popular detective drama. Inspector Jack Frost's investigation into the case of a missing child uncovers a skeleton chained to a locked strongbox that tantalisingly turns out to be empty, but provides evidence of a crime committed 30 years previously. David Jason stars as the irascible detective, with Bruce Alexander, Matt Bardock and Claire Hackett

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth falls victim to depression after failing to prevent the murder of a society girl by notorious art thief Marrascaud. His confidence shattered, Poirot eventually returns to work when a lonely chauffeur begs him to find his missing soulmate, the maid of a famous Russian dancer. The investigation takes him to the Swiss Alps, where, against all odds, he stumbles upon a hotel thought to be Marrascaud's hideout - leading to a very personal showdown. The penultimate episode of the long-running detective drama, starring David Suchet, with Simon Callow, Orla Brady, Patrick Ryecart, Nigel Lindsay, Morven Christie, Tom Austen and Rupert Evans

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Rishi Persad introduces live coverage of five races from the Curragh, along with three races from Chelmsford. From the Curragh: The 2.35 Blandford Stakes, 3.10 Flying Five, 3.40 Moyglare Stakes, 4.10 Vincent O'Brien National Stakes and 4.40 Irish St Leger. With analysis from Matt Chapman, Sally Ann Grassick and Kevin Blake, reports from Natalie Green and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper Belgian sleuth goes on an Egyptian cruise on board an old steamer, but when an American heiress is murdered, his little grey cells go into overdrive. On questioning each of his fellow passengers, he realises many of them have secrets they want to remain hidden. David Suchet stars, with James Fox, Judy Parfitt, Emily Blunt, Daisy Donovan, Frances de la Tour and David Soul

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The headmaster of a local school is murdered, his body found pinned to the wall in the manner of his own butterfly collection. The dead man was a mysterious international club for geniuses, which are currently testing the school's pupils for possible new recruits. Barnaby and Winter investigate the secretive organisation, which has proven controversial in the local area, but also uncover the possibility of a connection between the killing and the impact of pesticides on a rare species of butterfly

programme.title: Inside the Crown: Secrets of the Royals
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on the royals' rollercoaster relationship with the press, beginning with the Queen's 1953-1954 Commonwealth tour, when cameramen worked hand-in-hand with the palace. A few years later, newspaper owner Lord Altrincham was attacked for daring to publish criticisms of the Queen, but by the mid-1970s Princess Margaret's hedonistic lifestyle was the subject of increasing press attention. But that was only the beginning. In the 1990s, the press has a field day over the breakdown of Charles and Diana's marriage, feeding on royal scandals

programme.title: Sanditon
programme.desc: It's the final visit to the Sunday night period drama, giving viewers a chance to find out how writer Andrew Davies has brought his adaptation of Jane Austen's unfinished novel to an end. On the night of the Midsummer Ball, romantic interests are finally resolved. However, the fate of Sanditon is in the balance when events conspire to leave Charlotte and the Parker family facing down impossible choices. Rose Williams stars as the feisty heroine, with Theo James, Anne Reid and Kris Marshall

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. When Tom McMahon becomes the third victim of a spate of suspicious fires, Banks realises he is now on the trail of a serial killer. A new discovery about the methods used by the murderer casts doubt on the alibis of all his suspects and the detective is determined to get to the truth at the Asperns' house - despite being warned by his superiors to stay away from the family. Stephen Tompkinson stars

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part one of two. Cabbot investigates when a woman is found murdered on the moors. As the identity of the victim is established, it becomes apparent any number of suspects may have had a reason to want her dead. Meanwhile, Banks is called in when the body of a teenage girl is discovered in a storage room down an alleyway. Stephen Tompkinson and Andrea Lowe star

programme.title: Davina McCall: Life at the Extreme
programme.desc: Davina travels to the Norwegian archipelago of Svalbard in the Arctic Circle, a harsh environment set across 15 million sq km of sea ice where temperatures can drop to -40C. She learns how huskies' thick fur is better insulation than goose down, that the deep pads on their paws protect them from the cold and their almond shaped eyes mean they are less exposed in a blizzard. She also tracks a polar bear to the open sea and witnesses bearded seals using their whiskers like feelers to find shrimp and crab on the ocean floor

programme.title: Paul O'Grady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: Paul and the staff prepare for a visit from the Queen, who is arriving to officially open the new kennels, and one lucky dog is chosen for a special audience with the royal visitor - corgi Beama, who is paying her second visit to Battersea in 12 years. Elsewhere, the rehoming van has travelled all the way to the Isle of Wight to pick up eight Chihuahua siblings, whose owner sadly had no choice but to give them up, and handler James helps four-year-old pug Maggie comes to terms with being blind

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Former nanny Lavinia Seagram is found soaked in blood and it is believed she had turned to drink and drugs to commit suicide. However, Poirot is soon on the scent of troubled heiress Norma Restarick, who had problems of her own - not least confessing to the possibility she has killed someone herself. Guest starring Jemima Rooper, Zoe Wanamaker and Peter Bowles, with David Suchet as the Belgian sleuth

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid's tries to join the pop scene make him a laughing stock and he realises the generation gap is wider than ever

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Belle is upset when Paddy confronts her for starting a family feud and is also annoyed to hear Paddy and Marlon talking about her and Jamie behind their backs. As Harriet heads off to a religious retreat, Dawn tries to calm a paranoid Will, who refuses to listen and places an urgent furtive phone call

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tricia apologises to Sally. Maureen goes on a blind date. Stephen is embarrassed when Alma questions him over his relationship with Deirdre

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vera lends Tricia her support when she goes for a scan at the hospital. Maxine dreams of hitting the big time. Maud gets Bill to take her and Maureen to the pictures

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sophie tries to get close to Zoe. Zak writes a tribute song to Frank Tate. Chris is in a bad way following Frank's death, but he's speechless when Kim turns up at his house

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe turns on Kim and demands to know whose body was found in the quarry. Kim is surprised to learn her murder inquiry is still open. Jack avoids facing Andy

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Bellamy is forced to confront painful memories when he is subjected to a series of attacks and Walker begins to suspect a recently released prisoner may be involved. Lord Ashfordly's visiting relatives receive a cool reception and Bernie is shocked to find Rosie working at the garage, but impressed once he discovers her lucrative new venture. Starring Mark Jordon, Jonathan Kerrigan and Vanessa Hehir

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid dodges a stage performance, only to end up sorting out props and scenery. Classic comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Cash-strapped George knows exactly what he can sell to raise money - but decides not to tell Mildred. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth falls victim to depression after failing to prevent the murder of a society girl by notorious art thief Marrascaud. His confidence shattered, Poirot eventually returns to work when a lonely chauffeur begs him to find his missing soulmate, the maid of a famous Russian dancer. The investigation takes him to the Swiss Alps, where, against all odds, he stumbles upon a hotel thought to be Marrascaud's hideout - leading to a very personal showdown. The penultimate episode of the long-running detective drama, starring David Suchet, with Simon Callow, Orla Brady, Patrick Ryecart, Nigel Lindsay, Morven Christie, Tom Austen and Rupert Evans

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Merton and Walker investigate a security van raid in Ashfordly and are convinced there is a link to a recent robbery at a local airfield, but a senior officer visiting from Middlesbrough dismisses their claims. Vernon takes a sudden interest in the flower show when he discovers David might be the owner of a rare, potentially prize-winning fuchsia and turns to Blaketon and Ventress for help when the plant suddenly disappears

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani present coverage of day three of the St Leger Meeting from Doncaster, featuring five races including the 1.40 Mallard Handicap, 2.10 Flying Childers Stakes and 3.15 Doncaster Cup. With analysis from Kevin Blake and Jason Weaver, reports by Matt Chapman, Luke Harvey and Sally Ann Grassick, and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris is furious that the police let Kim go without charging her. Andy and the Sugdens have a meeting with the headmistress. Kim makes Sophie doubt Frank's innocence

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The coffin containing the mystery body is exhumed. Sophie tells Kim that she needs to get to know James again. DI Cooke arrives just as Chris threatens Kim

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken is asked to direct the school play after the drama teacher falls ill. Jim heckles Liz in the street over money. Tricia assures the Duckworths she's finished with Carl

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fred offers Alec the chance to join Square Dealers. Ken struggles directing A Midsummer Night's Dream. Maud is stunned when Maureen tells her about her blind date

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Merton and Walker investigate a security van raid in Ashfordly and are convinced there is a link to a recent robbery at a local airfield, but a senior officer visiting from Middlesbrough dismisses their claims. Vernon takes a sudden interest in the flower show when he discovers David might be the owner of a rare, potentially prize-winning fuchsia and turns to Blaketon and Ventress for help when the plant suddenly disappears

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A well-known eccentric contacts the Belgian sleuth when he is haunted by suicidal nightmares. However, he fails to follow Poirot's advice, and is found dead soon afterwards. Drama, starring David Suchet, with Joely Richardson and Mary Tamm

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa decides to leave for Spain with baby James and says an awkward goodbye to Martin, but when he finds the scan of her brain, he spots a malformation and realises she could suffer a haemorrhage if she gets on the plane. Will the doctor make it to the airport in time? Meanwhile, Margaret reveals the real reason she has come to Portwenn, and disaster strikes at Bert and Jennifer's engagement party when Caroline receives an electric shock

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: With Louisa visiting her mother in Spain to get some perspective on their marriage, Martin knows he needs to try to change for the sake of their relationship, so he endeavours to keep his promise to her to see a therapist. Aunt Ruth arranges an appointment for him with Dr Rachel Timoney, but a lifeboat training exercise causes problems for the doctor. Will he get back in time for his first session? Martin Clunes stars

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part one of two. Cabbot investigates when a woman is found murdered on the moors. As the identity of the victim is established, it becomes apparent any number of suspects may have had a reason to want her dead. Meanwhile, Banks is called in when the body of a teenage girl is discovered in a storage room down an alleyway. Stephen Tompkinson and Andrea Lowe star

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Feature-length episode of the crime drama. DI Frost has his hands full coping with death threats, arson and a staff shortage at the station - but anything is better than staying at home with an unwelcome guest. David Jason stars as the grouchy inspector, with Tony Haygarth, Diane Bull, Denise Black and Dominic Jephcott

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Belle is upset when Paddy confronts her for starting a family feud and is also annoyed to hear Paddy and Marlon talking about her and Jamie behind their backs. As Harriet heads off to a religious retreat, Dawn tries to calm a paranoid Will, who refuses to listen and places an urgent furtive phone call

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Dawn admonishes Will, reminding him what happened last time he brought a gun into the house, while Cain notices the church door has been left open and finds Harriet inside sobbing. When Amy arrives at the Woolpack for her pizza tasting night she's hurt to discover Marlon has also invited others, and things get worse when Tracy arrives as there's an obvious frostiness between the two girls

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Another chance to see the feature-length first episode of the popular detective drama. Inspector Jack Frost's investigation into the case of a missing child uncovers a skeleton chained to a locked strongbox that tantalisingly turns out to be empty, but provides evidence of a crime committed 30 years previously. David Jason stars as the irascible detective, with Bruce Alexander, Matt Bardock and Claire Hackett

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth falls victim to depression after failing to prevent the murder of a society girl by notorious art thief Marrascaud. His confidence shattered, Poirot eventually returns to work when a lonely chauffeur begs him to find his missing soulmate, the maid of a famous Russian dancer. The investigation takes him to the Swiss Alps, where, against all odds, he stumbles upon a hotel thought to be Marrascaud's hideout - leading to a very personal showdown. The penultimate episode of the long-running detective drama, starring David Suchet, with Simon Callow, Orla Brady, Patrick Ryecart, Nigel Lindsay, Morven Christie, Tom Austen and Rupert Evans

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Rishi Persad introduces live coverage of five races from the Curragh, along with three races from Chelmsford. From the Curragh: The 2.35 Blandford Stakes, 3.10 Flying Five, 3.40 Moyglare Stakes, 4.10 Vincent O'Brien National Stakes and 4.40 Irish St Leger. With analysis from Matt Chapman, Sally Ann Grassick and Kevin Blake, reports from Natalie Green and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper Belgian sleuth goes on an Egyptian cruise on board an old steamer, but when an American heiress is murdered, his little grey cells go into overdrive. On questioning each of his fellow passengers, he realises many of them have secrets they want to remain hidden. David Suchet stars, with James Fox, Judy Parfitt, Emily Blunt, Daisy Donovan, Frances de la Tour and David Soul

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The headmaster of a local school is murdered, his body found pinned to the wall in the manner of his own butterfly collection. The dead man was a mysterious international club for geniuses, which are currently testing the school's pupils for possible new recruits. Barnaby and Winter investigate the secretive organisation, which has proven controversial in the local area, but also uncover the possibility of a connection between the killing and the impact of pesticides on a rare species of butterfly

programme.title: Inside the Crown: Secrets of the Royals
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on the royals' rollercoaster relationship with the press, beginning with the Queen's 1953-1954 Commonwealth tour, when cameramen worked hand-in-hand with the palace. A few years later, newspaper owner Lord Altrincham was attacked for daring to publish criticisms of the Queen, but by the mid-1970s Princess Margaret's hedonistic lifestyle was the subject of increasing press attention. But that was only the beginning. In the 1990s, the press has a field day over the breakdown of Charles and Diana's marriage, feeding on royal scandals

programme.title: Sanditon
programme.desc: It's the final visit to the Sunday night period drama, giving viewers a chance to find out how writer Andrew Davies has brought his adaptation of Jane Austen's unfinished novel to an end. On the night of the Midsummer Ball, romantic interests are finally resolved. However, the fate of Sanditon is in the balance when events conspire to leave Charlotte and the Parker family facing down impossible choices. Rose Williams stars as the feisty heroine, with Theo James, Anne Reid and Kris Marshall

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part two of two. When Tom McMahon becomes the third victim of a spate of suspicious fires, Banks realises he is now on the trail of a serial killer. A new discovery about the methods used by the murderer casts doubt on the alibis of all his suspects and the detective is determined to get to the truth at the Asperns' house - despite being warned by his superiors to stay away from the family. Stephen Tompkinson stars

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Part one of two. Cabbot investigates when a woman is found murdered on the moors. As the identity of the victim is established, it becomes apparent any number of suspects may have had a reason to want her dead. Meanwhile, Banks is called in when the body of a teenage girl is discovered in a storage room down an alleyway. Stephen Tompkinson and Andrea Lowe star

programme.title: Davina McCall: Life at the Extreme
programme.desc: Davina travels to the Norwegian archipelago of Svalbard in the Arctic Circle, a harsh environment set across 15 million sq km of sea ice where temperatures can drop to -40C. She learns how huskies' thick fur is better insulation than goose down, that the deep pads on their paws protect them from the cold and their almond shaped eyes mean they are less exposed in a blizzard. She also tracks a polar bear to the open sea and witnesses bearded seals using their whiskers like feelers to find shrimp and crab on the ocean floor

programme.title: Paul O'Grady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: Paul and the staff prepare for a visit from the Queen, who is arriving to officially open the new kennels, and one lucky dog is chosen for a special audience with the royal visitor - corgi Beama, who is paying her second visit to Battersea in 12 years. Elsewhere, the rehoming van has travelled all the way to the Isle of Wight to pick up eight Chihuahua siblings, whose owner sadly had no choice but to give them up, and handler James helps four-year-old pug Maggie comes to terms with being blind

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Former nanny Lavinia Seagram is found soaked in blood and it is believed she had turned to drink and drugs to commit suicide. However, Poirot is soon on the scent of troubled heiress Norma Restarick, who had problems of her own - not least confessing to the possibility she has killed someone herself. Guest starring Jemima Rooper, Zoe Wanamaker and Peter Bowles, with David Suchet as the Belgian sleuth

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid's tries to join the pop scene make him a laughing stock and he realises the generation gap is wider than ever

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Belle is upset when Paddy confronts her for starting a family feud and is also annoyed to hear Paddy and Marlon talking about her and Jamie behind their backs. As Harriet heads off to a religious retreat, Dawn tries to calm a paranoid Will, who refuses to listen and places an urgent furtive phone call

programme.title: World Cup Rivalries: England v Argentina
programme.desc: Short sports film about this compelling sporting rivalry.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The Contessa and Paul uncover a plot to destroy all members of the organisation but are unable to contact Harry to warn him. Drama, starring Robert Vaughn and Nyree Dawn Porter

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A Scottish detective on the trail of a gang of crooks requests help, and the squad resolves to catch his quarry. However, it becomes apparent that the visiting sleuth is holding back some important information that Regan and his colleagues need to know. TV presenter Janet Ellis features in a supporting role

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A woman asks Holmes to search for her missing husband, a businessman who was last seen peering from the window of an opium den in London's notorious Limehouse area. Suspicion falls on a well-known local beggar - but his innocence is eventually proved in bizarre fashion. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Emma is enticed into the imposing mansion of an elderly bridge expert, where she is forced to get by without Steed, who is at home nursing a sprained ankle. Ronald Lacey guest stars

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur becomes concerned about security at the lock-up, and employs Ron the burglar to install the latest hi-tech alarm system. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle begin an investigation into why a city's crime rate is steadily falling. They later find themselves victimised by local officers after being charged with a minor traffic offence. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights
programme.desc: Action from stage 12 of the most prestigious race on the calendar, featuring a hilly 218km route from Chauvigny to Sarran Correze. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.desc: Coverage of stage 13 of the most prestigious race on the calendar, featuring a mountainous 191.5km course from Chatel-Guyon to Puy Mary Cantal. programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The team are sent to Spain with orders to persuade a woman to return home to her father. Robert Vaughn and Nyree Dawn Porter star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle have reason to suspect their former mentor has turned 'rogue' for money after two key suspects in a drug-smuggling case are delivered to their killers. Action drama, with Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Glyn Owen

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter track down those responsible for killing a driver and injuring a policeman while making off with vehicles carrying brandy on two separate occasions. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: On the Canada-US border lies a vast lake that hides a dark history. For Native Americans it's an ancient and sacred site, but recently something has risen up from the depths to attack swimmers, and stories abound of an invasion of primordial bloodsuckers. Extreme angler Jeremy Wade plunges into the heart of a waterfall in the Pacific Northwest on a mission to catch the oldest river monster of his career

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: The team head to the Netherlands, which is renowned for its extensive waterways, but they will be focusing their attention on a lake called Carplantis which is home to some fantastic-looking, and very large carp. Plus, they also take in a spot of barbel fishing on the River Meuse

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade embarks on one of his most challenging journeys as he investigates reports of a face-eating creature in a remote part of Bolivia. Finding his skills and knowledge tested to the limit, he encounters one of his oldest adversaries and discovers how a species can adapt its behaviour to survive

programme.title: Snooker v Darts
programme.desc: Short sports film

programme.title: Smokey and the Bandit (1977)
programme.desc: A truck driver accepts a challenge to deliver a consignment of beer to a party. He claims he can make the 900-mile round trip in just 28 hours, but a pompous sheriff is determined to stop him in his tracks, not least because his prospective daughter-in-law has deserted his son and hitched a ride with the unlikely hero. Comedy, starring Burt Reynolds, Jackie Gleason, Sally Field and Jerry Reed

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: The brother of a suspected drug-dealer dies while in custody, and his elder sibling directs his powerful lawyer to instigate a committee to investigate CI5's involvement. With the future of the division in question, Bodie and Doyle try to prove the family's drug-trade connection and the real reason behind the man's death. Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star

programme.title: Motorsport UK
programme.desc: Richard John Neil presents action from Donington Park, including the third round of both the F4 British Championship and the Ginetta GT4 Supercup

programme.title: DTM Highlights 2020
programme.desc: Action from the racing series as the world's best drivers go for glory over nine stages set in Belgium, Germany and Holland

programme.title: World Rally Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The Rally Estonia. Action from the fourth round of the campaign, where the drivers negotiated fast gravel roads with plenty of crests and jumps

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights

programme.title: World of Sport

programme.title: Tour de France Live 2020
programme.desc: Coverage of stage 15, featuring a mountainous 174.5km course from Lyon to Grand Colombier, as the riders negotiate 100km of flat roads, before heading to the foot of the mountains. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: A report from Southeast Asia, of something in the water that's sliced cleanly through a young man's testicles, is enough to lure 'fishing detective' Jeremy Wade to the shores of the Mekong - a river long renowned for its monstrous fish. But what kind of creature could have inflicted such a distinctive, surgical wound? In his quest to expose the unseen mutilator, Jeremy uncovers multiple victims who've been mauled, half-blinded, and even fatally wounded by the same mysterious assailant - a baby-faced killer that appears to be proliferating

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to Africa's Okavango Delta to reinvestigate the tigerfish - a pack-hunting carnivore previously blamed for mauling the victims of a capsized boat. If these fish are as lethal as Jeremy concluded, then why aren't there more reports of fatal, piranha-like attacks? In a bid to flush out the true nature of these sight-hunting predators, Jeremy puts on his dive gear and offers himself as live bait

programme.title: ITV Football Classics
programme.desc: Gabriel Clarke introduces extended highlights of the quarter-final match from Stade Pierre-Mauroy in Lille, France. Chris Coleman's side had impressed many to reach the knockout rounds, with Gareth Bale and Aaron Ramsey in starring roles, but it was their less-celebrated teammates who grabbed the headlines against the highly-fancied Belgians in this entertaining match. Commentary by Clive Tyldesley and Craig Bellamy

programme.title: Sports Filler
programme.desc: Short film about the legendary racehorse

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights
programme.desc: Action from stage 15, featuring a mountainous 174.5km course from Lyon to Grand Colombier. Gary Imlach presents, with analysis from Chris Boardman and Peter Kennaugh, reports by Daniel Friebe and Matthew Rendell, and commentary from Ned Boulting and David Millar

programme.title: The Living Daylights (1987)
programme.desc: James Bond crosses the continents to help a KGB agent to defect to the West. Action adventure, with Timothy Dalton making his debut appearance as 007, alongside Maryam d'Abo, Joe Don Baker and Art Malik

programme.desc: A report from Southeast Asia, of something in the water that's sliced cleanly through a young man's testicles, is enough to lure 'fishing detective' Jeremy Wade to the shores of the Mekong - a river long renowned for its monstrous fish. But what kind of creature could have inflicted such a distinctive, surgical wound? In his quest to expose the unseen mutilator, Jeremy uncovers multiple victims who've been mauled, half-blinded, and even fatally wounded by the same mysterious assailant - a baby-faced killer that appears to be proliferating

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to Africa's Okavango Delta to reinvestigate the tigerfish - a pack-hunting carnivore previously blamed for mauling the victims of a capsized boat. If these fish are as lethal as Jeremy concluded, then why aren't there more reports of fatal, piranha-like attacks? In a bid to flush out the true nature of these sight-hunting predators, Jeremy puts on his dive gear and offers himself as live bait

programme.desc: Niles becomes jealous when Daphne meets a dog-lover while out with Eddie. Martin secretly attends the parole hearing of the man who shot him. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink is mortified when he learns Niles, Martin and Daphne are planning to go along on his trip to Belize with Claire. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce, John Mahoney and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Amit Kleinberger, the CEO and co-owner of frozen yoghurt chain Menchie's, poses as a participant in a reality TV contest to find out whether consistency is being maintained in his stores. The company has experienced rapid growth and Amit tries to establish what changes must be made to become a billion-dollar business

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Includes headlines and weather

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: River Cottage
programme.desc: Hugh Fearnley-Whittingstall makes chocolate brownies to give as Christmas gifts and uses his slaughtered steer to create canapes of biltong and pastrami for a party. He heads to an Exeter nightclub to continue his mission to get wild rabbits back onto the British menu, hunts for the blewitt mushroom, and tries to catch herring for the first time. First shown in December 2009

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley present the words-and-numbers game, with magician and comedian Paul Zenon joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to the Chiltern Hills in Buckinghamshire to meet Adam and Mandy, who run a classic car restoration business. Henry uncovers an anvil, while Simon finds an old brown dresser, which he thinks could become a wildlife sanctuary for birds and insects

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mother-of-two Currina seeks a holiday home along Spain's northern Costa Cálida. With a budget of £65,000 and her best friend Tracey by her side for support, expert Jean Johansson is called upon to pull out all the stops in locating five possible properties. Whether any will prove the perfect one for Currina remains to be seen

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three rival duos compete in Cardiff to host the best dinner party. Newlyweds Laura and Sean kick off the week with a Hawaiian feast. Then, Lesley and Keith host, with Lesley wanting to glam things up a bit with some posh nosh. Howevwer, their starter incites some pungent punditing. Laura wows the table with a wedding rendition, and the tale of the missing finger points to Keith. On the final night, everyone is looking forward to Rachel and Lee's curry, but they confound expectations by fusing traditional with different flavours

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge are accused of being bad parents and sent to a special class to resolve the problem, resulting in Bart, Lisa and Maggie being placed in the care of Ned Flanders - who promptly decides to have them baptised

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart sells his soul to Milhouse for $5, but soon starts to fear he has made an unwise move. Meanwhile, sleazy bar owner Moe decides to go upmarket, and relaunches the tavern as Uncle Moe's Family Feedbag restaurant

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Lodgers for Codgers
programme.desc: The chances of a 25 to 35-year-old person owning a home have halved in the last 20 years, while millions of over-sixties are sitting on empty rooms, so here young and old tackle Britain's housing crisis by trialling a unique solution - moving in together. In this third instalment, dog groomer Liah-Rose moves home and business to Reading and pensioner landlords Carolynne and David's high-octane lifestyle. Meanwhile, Jake from Middlesbrough heads for 61-year-old Christene's place in Pontefract, West Yorkshire

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics return to share their opinions on shows including (Un)well, When Harry Met Sally, Countdown, Britain's Got Talent, Mary Berry's Simple Comforts, Elephant Hospital, BBC news reports on quarantine, and young people and Covid, and ITV news coverage of Brexit

programme.title: Sarah Millican: Control Enthusiast
programme.desc: A stand-up performance by the comedian, including topics such as road rage, IBS, her favourite word and how she lets her husband know 'tonight's the night'. There are also stories about 'Rescue Men', passing wind in hospital pants, what can happen at a bra fitting and how she feels about her belly

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Recruitment consultant and boxing ring girl Chloe sits down with 'geezer' Anthony, who believes his cheeky wink can charm any woman. Actor Josh seeks a leading lady, but as a dwarf he has struggled to find someone who won't judge him on his height. His date is housing support officer Lori, who at four foot 11 has also found love a challenge. Also, dedicated father Rob is paired with former Butlin's Redcoat Donna. How will she react when he reveals he has 10 children?

programme.title: Table 19 (2017)
programme.desc: Dumped by the best man via text, a former maid of honour decides to pitch up at her friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself relegated to table 19, where her tablemates include a nanny, an openly warring married couple, a teenager seeking a date and a gangly Englishman who's clearly hiding a secret. Comedy, starring Anna Kendrick, Craig Robinson, Lisa Kudrow and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hair and beauty tutor April Richards hosts the first dinner party in Birmingham. She plans a starter of zebra meat, but the dish does not go down well with employment adviser Paz Thakrar, who is a strict vegetarian and thinks that even eating vegetables is cruel

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Scientist John Fennel hosts the second party in Birmingham, and decides to prepare an ambitious menu that makes use of his skills in the lab. His culinary experiments include the use of soda-siphoned fish batter, a specially crafted fire-maker, a tandoor chimney, and ice-cream made with nitrogen oxide

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third dinner party in Birmingham is hosted by banker Vanessa Erigbogbo, who describes herself as a brilliant cook. She hopes to impress her guests with a classy menu of lobster, confit of duck, and fried grasshopper canapes, but forgets to cater for a vegetarian diner

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Strict vegetarian Paz Thakrar hosts the penultimate dinner party in Birmingham, but his meat-eating guests show little enthusiasm for the menu and are further displeased by the idea of a karaoke session afterwards

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Insolvency administrator Toni Shukla hosts the final dinner party in Birmingham, and appears to have a good chance of securing the £1,000 prize after her rivals' unsuccessful evenings. However, her lack of cookery knowledge threatens to scupper her hopes of gaining the most points

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: A pride of lions at the Sibuya Game Reserve that once ate some poachers need to be moved - but the task of transporting them to their new home is far from safe. Emma checks on some genets and a bush baby, while over at the Vervet Monkey Foundation, Josie introduces some blind and compromised monkeys to their new home

programme.title: Fifteen to One
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts the general knowledge quiz in which 15 contestants try to win a place in the end-of-series final, when a £40,000 jackpot will be up for grabs

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp tries out classic recipes for Cornish pasties and Yorkshire puddings. She also meets pig farmer Jennie Whitely, who shows her how to successfully use all parts of the animal, and finds out what goes into brawn - a meat jelly made with flesh from a pig's head

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra wants to buy an expensive dress for Ally to wear to a friend's 13th birthday party, but Ray refuses to spend $250 on something that will only be used once, and naturally Marie takes his side. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Madylin Sweeten

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert contemplates leaving the police force to take up a job selling security systems, but the proposal receives a mixed reaction, leading to tense celebrations at his birthday party. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Brad Garrett and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon discover their favourite childhood TV science show host Professor Proton can be booked for private parties and decide to hire him to entertain them. Meanwhile, Raj asks Howard and Bernadette to look after his dog for the weekend, but the couple panic when the canine goes missing. Guest starring Bob Newhart

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys invite the girls to a Dungeons and Dragons night when their trip to Vegas falls through after an incident with airport security. However, following a few drinks, Sheldon and Amy's relationship takes an unexpected turn. Meanwhile, Raj goes on a date with Lucy, who tries to sneak out of the restaurant's bathroom window - but ends up getting stuck and calling for his help

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is offered an exciting job opportunity, but it will mean he has to leave the country for several months. Penny tries to support his ambitions, while Sheldon is jealous and attempts to discourage him from accepting the post. Meanwhile, Raja pushes the boundaries with Lucy, but puts their relationship in jeopardy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny bond as they miss Leonard, and Howard tries to help Raj get over his break-up with Lucy. Meanwhile, Bernadette and Amy visit an out-of-town biology convention. Comedy about four high-achieving scientists, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Troy McClure hosts three spin-off segments, transplanting characters from the show into new situations and locations, including Chief Wiggum's attempt to make his name as a private investigator, ably assisted by streetwise sidekick Principal Skinner, alias 'Skinny Boy'

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge force Bart to enrol in a military academy and Lisa unwisely follows him. Once in her own barracks she is snubbed by the other cadets - but receives unexpected help from Bart to tackle the assault course. Featuring the guest voice of Willem Dafoe

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Part two of two. Accusations fly thick and fast in the wake of Mr Burns's shooting, and it is up to Chief Wiggum to discover who pulled the trigger - but plenty of people in Springfield had a motive for wanting the old tyrant dead. Featuring the guest voice of Tito Puente

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Milhouse vie for the coveted role of costumed sidekick Fallout Boy in a new feature film about their comic-book hero Radioactive Man. Featuring the guest voice of Mickey Rooney

programme.title: Animal Airport
programme.desc: The handlers at Heathrow's Animal Reception Centre have their hands full with in-transit chameleons, racehorses and rare foxes. All are checked out but some may not survive

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Copper Beech House in Malvern, Worcestershire, a B&B run by ex-professional rugby union player Steve Lloyd and his partner Kathy Leather

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the pet-friendly Dog in a Doublet in Peterborough, where Della McGinn's passion for animals comes a close second to husband John's passion for food

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at the Torcroft Boutique B&B in Torquay, south Devon, where Phil and Sharon Hobson hope their added extras will help win over their rivals

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at the 600-year-old Rhydspence Inn in Herefordshire, where the medieval character proves charming, although the everyday practicalities prove painful for some

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores. Copper Beech House are first to host and Steve and Kathy want Phil to swallow his synthetic sausage comment

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick treats a Persian cat that has been hit by a car, requiring treatments involving a skin graft and putting its crushed bones back together. Meanwhile, a rescue dog has a cancerous tumour in his jaw removed, and a young staffie-cross needs treatment for a developmental elbow disease

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps a couple from Brighton to find a holiday home in the Dordogne region of south-west France on a budget of £100,000

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: James Blunt, Alison Hammond, Alex Jones and Joe Sugg take part in the charity culinary challenge, under the watchful eye of presenters Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding, and judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. For the signature round, they must prepare a batch of decorated traybakes, while the technical challenge involves a classic British staple. Finally, for the Showstopper, they must create a scene out of biscuits depicting what they wanted to be when they grew up

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet newlyweds Nikki and Andy Taylor-Myers in Northampton, who have recently merged households and are unhappy in their cluttered terrace. Property services manager Andy is desperate to stay in their home, but drama and support teacher Nikki has reached boiling point and wants a fresh start

programme.title: Channel 4 News

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones and David Coulthard present action from the qualifying session for the inaugural Tuscan Grand Prix, staged at Mugello. Lewis Hamilton will start as favourite once again to put himself in pole position, having recorded the fastest time in qualifying for a sixth time in eight races at the Italian Grand Prix last time out, which was also the 94th pole of his career overall

Director Matthew Vaughn's comedy adventure sequel, starring Taron Egerton, Colin Firth, Mark Strong and Julianne Moore

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is delighted to be awarded an honorary doctorate, but hurts Debra's feelings by thanking everyone except her in his acceptance speech. He claims it was an accident, though she takes the opportunity to remind him of past snubs that were obviously deliberate

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's parents draw attention to Robert's strange eating habits, making him feel self-conscious every time he sits down for a meal - so Debra devises a plan to cure him once and for all. Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: An invitation to spend Easter with the Barones spurs the MacDougalls to unite with the family over a 500-piece jigsaw puzzle - until Ray and Pat upset the apple cart by indulging in more than their fair share of bonding. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard returns from his research expedition in the North Sea and undergoes an adjustment period with Sheldon. Howard experiences an unusual emotional reaction as a result of his relationship with his mother. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends compete in a scavenger hunt designed by Raj to test their scientific knowledge and life skills, but the game brings out the best and worst in everyone. As the hunt progresses, Howard and Amy begin to bond over their shared musical tastes, while Penny and Sheldon work together as a team and Bernadette becomes fiercely competitive

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon introduces Amy to Raiders of the Lost Ark - one of his favourite films - and is distraught when she ends up pointing out a plot hole that ruins the whole story. Meanwhile, Leonard realises he can manipulate Penny into feeling sorry for him when his mother publishes a reveal-all book about his childhood problems. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is desperate to redeem himself after he forgets Marge's eye colour and their wedding anniversary. Meanwhile, Milhouse usurps Bart as the cool kid at school when his parents are lost at sea

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob returns and makes yet another attempt to kill Bart - this time with the help of his entire family. With the guest voices of Frasier stars Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and John Mahoney

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer wakes up to find he has lost not only his memory of the previous 24 hours, but also his family - and enlists the help of Professor Frink to discover what has happened. Chief Wiggum then compounds his misery by informing him of a domestic disturbance at his home the previous night

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mayor Quimby brings election day forward, making Springfield's primary election the first to be held in the country. However, the candidates are so uninspiring that the voters write Ralph Wiggum on the ballot as a joke

programme.title: Congo (1995)
programme.desc: An expedition to find King Solomon's diamond mines in the jungles of the Congo disappears without trace. The tycoon behind the mission sends his assistant, a former CIA agent, to find out what became of the explorers - only to discover that the party met a grisly fate at the hands of a horde of vicious apes. Action adventure based on Michael Crichton's novel, with Dylan Walsh, Laura Linney, Tim Curry and Grant Heslov

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Married couple Steve and Dawn first visited Mijas on the eastern coast of Spain 11 years ago and have wanted to own a holiday home there ever since. programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: More of the most memorable moments from the past five years, looking back at some of Chester's more wily residents that have proven themselves to be expert escapologists. When the Sumatran orangutans are moved to a new home, keepers discover on CCTV that four of the troupe have gone missing. Meanwhile, three-month-old Andean bear cub Madidi escapes into the paddock next door

programme.title: Channel 4 News

programme.title: Formula 1

Ferrari marked their 1,000th race here, on the track that they use for testing, but the Prancing Horses will have had to first get past Lewis Hamilton, who was looking to extend his championship lead and inflict more misery on his rivals, as he chases a record-equalling seventh Drivers' Championship

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: George visits the magnificent and meticulously crafted country retreat of Standen in West Sussex - one of the best examples of the Arts and Crafts design movement to be found anywhere in the world. He discovers a masterpiece of Gothic Revival architecture at Tyntesfield in Somerset, with its acres of flower-filled terraces, and unleashes a medieval catapult at Corfe Castle in Dorset, an iconic ruin who's first stone was laid almost a millennium ago, before risking vertigo with his trusty companion Loki at the highest point on England's south coast - the famous Golden Cap

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Moscow Noir
programme.desc: Swedish thriller set in Moscow in 1999, focusing on ambitious young investment banker Tom Blixen, whose career is on the rocks after recent deals have fallen through. When his friend Fredrik asks for help selling some shares in a dead-end oil company called Neftnik, Tom sees a chance for them both to win when his researches turn up an unexploited oil field in Western Siberia. Tom must hustle in unknown financial territory to find sellers and buyers among very dodgy but wealthy businessmen, and his by-the-book boss Rebecka suspects that Tom is in over his head. In Russian, English and Swedish

programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: The Missing Evidence
programme.desc: Documentary Investigating some of the world's most notorious conspiracy theories. The release of the official conclusions as to why the World Trade Center's twin towers collapsed after the 9/11 attacks in 2001 left many unsatisfied, with video footage of molten metal pouring from the damaged floors and eyewitness reports of explosions not addressed fully and leading to talk of conspiracies. This programme looks at the theory of chemist Frank Greening and metallurgist Christian Simensen, who believe that the 30 tons of aluminum alloys from the two planes themselves are behind these unexplained occurrences

programme.title: Secrets of Center Parcs
programme.desc: How the Center Parcs holiday sites became the destination of choice for millions of UK families, featuring interviews with former executives and holidaymakers. Company insiders, such as former managing director Peter Moore, reveal the extraordinary story of how a Dutch idea became a British Institution, progressing from a small Dutch campsite in 1968, to a £2.5billion company, which is today a desirable destination for over two million Brits a year. There's a first-hand account from the fire chief who put out the devastating fire at Elveden Center Parcs in 2002, and unique insights from the man who oversaw the building of the very first iconic dome in Sherwood Forest in 1987

programme.title: Atlantic: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Stretching from the Antarctic in the south to the Arctic in the north, the Atlantic Ocean is vast, wild and unforgiving and each season brings new challenges for its indigenous creatures. Atlantic winters bring bitter storms, suffering and conflict. Animals that spend the frozen months here must be ready to face its fierce onslaught as short days make it difficult to find enough food in time. However, while most are battling to survive, some are just starting to raise a family

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: More faux pas featuring Hollywood A-Listers, such as Robert DeNiro having a run-in with a real-life taxi driver, Alec Baldwin getting pushy with a pap and Winona Ryder finding herself in court. Plus, Big Brother pals Bianca Gascoigne, Nicola McLean and Calum Best recall their hellish time in the infamous reality TV house, one-time EastEnders actress Danniella Westbrook talks about her struggles with drugs that shockingly left her nose rotting away, while controversial commentator Katie Hopkins comes clean about the tweet that cost her dearly and resulted in her losing her family home

programme.title: Secret Scotland

She visits romantic and rugged locations, and takes an in-depth look at their history, people and exciting treasures, often receiving private tours of iconic Scottish spots and uncovering hidden secrets of the past and present. From quiet countryside to brooding coastlines, this love letter to Scotland demonstrates the best of what the country has to offer

programme.title: Adele: In Her Own Words

programme.title: Carpenters: Their Greatest Hits

Each is accompanied by interesting facts about the act President Richard Nixon once described as 'Young America at its very best'

programme.title: Me & My 10 Kids: Mega Families
programme.desc: Ben and Zoe Sullivan and their 11 kids live in a remote seaside village on the coast of Scotland and today they are hoping to have a daytrip to the beach with the tribe. But preparing for the outing is not going to be a piece of cake. In Whistable, Kent we meet the Gale's and their tribe of ten. Mum Emma has decided that making food for 12 people isn't keeping her busy enough so has decided to do the catering for a christening party

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. The programme also reveals how long-fought battles result in Asbos, evictions and sometimes violence

programme.title: The Mega Council Estate Next Door
programme.desc: Ex-con AJ started writing poetry in 1985 and is being given the chance to perform it in public for the first time - at a recital in a posh pub. Local Good Samaritan Debbie has organised the event, but every time she sees AJ he's drunk - if he blows his big chance it will embarrass them both. Twenty-one-year-old model Lillie-Jo dreams of becoming a successful singer songwriter and has just brought out a debut single. She hopes a big marketing event in Leicester Square will help it reach 10,000 streams and downloads, proving to her manager that he's backed a winner

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Mandy and Christian's Pride parade finally arrives, but what begins as a stressful day only gets worse when the generator powering the speakers packs up. Can the duo turn things around or will the the revellers be expected to dance to a silent soundtrack? Meanwhile, cockney limo driver Johnny Diamond books two big jobs on the same night, and Bury couple Andy and Sue settle in to their static caravan in the Spanish countryside

programme.title: George Michael: The Price of Fame
programme.desc: Biographical documentary spotlighting the life story of George Michael, one of the best-selling music artists of all time, bringing an intimate perspective to the story of a superstar singer, recounting his rise, fall and later rise again, defying the odds and surprising critics and fans alive

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: Engineer Rob Bell explores the history of the design and construction of the Tyne Bridge, which links Newcastle and Gateshead, discovering many believe that it was the inspiration for the Sydney Harbour Bridge. He also finds out why the bridge is so revered by Geordies, not just as a way to cross the river, but because it was built to keep shipbuilders employed and their skills alive during the dark days of the 1920s recession

programme.title: Wildlife SOS

programme.title: Great Scientists

programme.title: House Doctor

programme.title: The Guns of Fort Petticoat (1957)
programme.desc: A lieutenant deserts after his commanding officer launches an unprovoked attack on a Comanche village during the Civil War. Realising that there are no soldiers in his home town to protect it from reprisals, he returns to train the local women to defend themselves. Western, starring Audie Murphy, Kathryn Grant, Hope Emerson and Jeff Donnell

programme.title: Sink the Bismarck! (1960)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama, charting the mission to track down and eliminate the pride of the German fleet, a fearsome battleship devastating British vessels in the North Atlantic, orchestrated by a British naval officer recovering from his wife's death in an air raid. Starring Kenneth More, Dana Wynter, Laurence Naismith and Karel Stepanek

programme.title: The Violent Men (1955)
programme.desc: A ruthless cattle baron sets out to create his own private empire, no matter what the cost. When he resorts to murder, he makes an enemy of a civil war veteran, while his lust for power drives his wife into the arms of his younger brother. Western, starring Edward G Robinson, Barbara Stanwyck and Glenn Ford

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe on Mars (1964)
programme.desc: Stranded on Mars with only a monkey as a companion, an astronaut has to quickly figure out how to survive a lack of oxygen, food and water on the lifeless planet. Sci-fi drama, inspired by Daniel Defoe's classic tale, starring Paul Mantee, Adam West and Victor Lundin

programme.title: Ender's Game (2013)
programme.desc: In the future, the human race has survived conflict with an alien race, but the prospect of war breaking out again is a constant threat. A gifted boy is selected as a potential military commander for the coming conflict, and subjected to a gruelling training program to prove his worth. Sci-fi adventure based on Orson Scott Card's novel, starring Asa Butterfield, Harrison Ford and Ben Kingsley

programme.title: Kingsman: The Secret Service (2015)
programme.desc: A streetwise teenager is taken under the wing of his dead father's old colleague, an agent working for a super-secret spy organisation. Action comedy based on a comic book, starring Colin Firth, Taron Egerton and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Shot Caller (2017)
programme.desc: An ex con is forced by the leaders of his gang to orchestrate a major crime with a brutal rival squad on the streets of Southern California. Crime drama, starring Jon Bernthal, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Lake Bell

programme.title: Lowlife (2017)
programme.desc: A ruthless LA crime boss connects three down-and-out reprobates who become mixed up in an organ-harvesting scheme. Comedy drama, starring Nicki Micheaux, Ricardo Adam Zarate and Jon Oswald

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes (1979)
programme.desc: An American heiress befriends an elderly lady on a continental train journey, but wakes one morning to find she has disappeared and the other passengers deny having ever seen the missing woman - leading to suspicions that a conspiracy is afoot. Remake of Hitchcock's 1938 mystery, starring Elliott Gould, Cybill Shepherd, Angela Lansbury, Herbert Lom, Arthur Lowe and Ian Carmichael

programme.title: The Boxtrolls (2014)
programme.desc: The people of a small town live in fear of underground trolls, who they do not realise are actually harmless. A boy raised by the creatures must convince the townsfolk there is nothing to fear when a team of pest exterminators is hired to wipe out the friendly monsters. Stop-motion animated fantasy, with the voices of Isaac Hempstead Wright, Elle Fanning and Ben Kingsley

programme.title: Sunshine on Leith (2013)
programme.desc: Two soldiers return home to the Scottish port town after finishing their tour of duty in Afghanistan. While they struggle to adjust to life as civilians, the parents of one of the squaddies prepare to celebrate their 30th anniversary in style. Musical featuring songs by the Proclaimers, starring George MacKay, Kevin Guthrie, Peter Mullan and Jane Horrocks

programme.title: Hotel for Dogs (2009)
programme.desc: An orphaned brother and sister face losing their beloved dog when they go into a foster home that does not allow pets. The kids find the ideal hiding place in an abandoned hotel, and set about transforming it into luxury canine accommodation for not just their beloved pet, but every stray in town. Family comedy, starring Emma Roberts, Jake T Austin, Don Cheadle and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (2014)
programme.desc: A reporter discovers four humanoid amphibians who live in the sewers of New York, and use their martial arts skills to fight crime. She helps them as they face their toughest challenge yet - defeating a sinister criminal organisation that seems to have power over the entire city. Fantasy adventure, starring Megan Fox and William Fichtner, with the voice of Johnny Knoxville

programme.title: The Heat (2013)
programme.desc: An uptight, ambitious FBI agent is sent to Boston to bring a notorious drug kingpin to justice. She ends up forced to team up with a rebellious, foul-mouthed local police detective who has a very different attitude to law enforcement but shares her inability to work with others. Action comedy, starring Sandra Bullock and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: The Devil's Doorway (2018)
programme.desc: In the autumn of 1960, Father Thomas Riley and Father John Thornton are sent by the Vatican to investigate a miraculous event in an Irish home for 'fallen women', only to uncover something much more terrifying. Horror, starring Lalor Roddy, Ciaran Flynn and Helena Bereen

programme.title: Under the Skin (2013)
programme.desc: An alien takes on the form of a dead woman and roams the streets of Glasgow. She seduces men only to mysteriously consume them, but as she observes the human race, her detachment begins to slip and she develops empathy with the people she encounters. Director Jonathan Glazer's sci-fi drama based on Michel Faber's novel, starring Scarlett Johansson

programme.title: Carry On Sergeant (1958)
programme.desc: A military sergeant approaching retirement hopes to end his career on a high note by seeing his last lot of recruits come first in an annual competition to find the best squad in the forces. However, he is not prepared for the hopeless band of misfits placed under his command. The first in the comedy series, starring William Hartnell and Bob Monkhouse

programme.title: Puss in Boots (2011)
programme.desc: The swashbuckling feline joins forces with a cunning thief and a treacherous old friend to steal a magical golden goose from a giant's castle. He must save the day when it transpires that their actions have unleashed a terrible danger on his home town. Animated comedy spin-off from the Shrek movies, with the voices of Antonio Banderas and Salma Hayek

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mother's heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

programme.title: Big Eyes (2014)
programme.desc: Aspiring painter Margaret Keane marries a controlling man who sells her artwork. As the paintings of large-eyed children grow tremendously popular, Margaret discovers he is claiming to have painted them himself, and she and her daughter are forced to live a lie for years - until she finally resolves to prove his deceit in court. Tim Burton's fact-based drama, starring Amy Adams, Christoph Waltz and Terence Stamp

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows (2016)
programme.desc: The sewer-dwelling heroes discover their arch enemy Shredder has returned from another dimension, and made a deal with an alien warlord. Assisted by two mutant henchman, Shredder goes in search of a lost device that will allow his new ally to mount an invasion of Earth. Action adventure sequel, starring Megan Fox, Will Arnett and Stephen Amell

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3 (2017)
programme.desc: Following their win at the world championship, the now-separated Bellas reunite for one last singing competition at an overseas USO tour, but face a group who uses both instruments and voices. Comedy sequel, starring Anna Kendrick, Rebel Wilson and Brittany Snow

programme.title: Trainspotting (1996)
programme.desc: A heroin addict makes a series of attempts to kick the habit, but the grind of everyday life and a circle of similarly self-destructive friends keep dragging him back to his old ways. Following a near-fatal overdose, he comes to the realisation that the only way to put his life in order is to rid himself of his friends - which is easier said than done. Danny Boyle's drama based on Irvine Welsh's novel, starring Ewan McGregor, Robert Carlyle and Ewen Bremner

programme.title: Ted 2 (2015)
programme.desc: The foul-mouthed talking teddy bear is horrified to discover that he counts as property according to the law. He and his human best friend hire a pot-smoking lawyer to help them fight a court case and get Ted legally recognised as a person. Comedy sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg and Amanda Seyfried, with the voice of Seth MacFarlane

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents' restaurant, Sal's Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after John's mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As they bond over their shared love for the movie Dirty Dancing, Beverly is thrilled when Erica suggests the film as the theme for the upcoming school dance. However, Principal Ball refuses to sanction anything with the word 'dirty' in the title, threatening Erica with suspension if she persists with the idea. Barry lobbies for the dance to be based on his favourite movie Footloose, while Adam and Pops encourage Murray to learn to dance in order to make Beverly happy

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam joins a mail-order music club, aiming to assemble an enviable cassette tape collection. He takes advantage of the 12 tapes for a penny promotion by opening multiple accounts with the club using fake names to get as much music as possible, but has no intention of continuing the monthly contracts. However, when Beverly discovers the scam she blames Erica. Barry asks Murray for help when he realises Lainey's dad Bill doesn't like him.

programme.desc: The fallout from the boys' night out leads the next dinner party to descend into chaos. While some couples become closer than ever, for others, it could be the beginning of the end

Starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard asks Penny out on a date, and they agree to give their relationship another chance. They soon remember why it did not work out in the first place, but end up sleeping together anyway. The 100th episode of the comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: When Adam takes his children to work with him for the day, they accidentally give his biggest client lice. Later, Andi feels like a bad mother when she's the only one in the family not to get lice. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Liza Snyder

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam notices his dad's increasingly forgetful behaviour, but struggles with how to approach him to discuss it Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc

programme.desc: Adam risks bodily harm during an intense game of paintball to impress his latest crush. Murray's stubborn behaviour causes Beverly to miss seeing the Beach Boys at Live Aid

programme.desc: When Sophia's job gets in the way of her relationship with Peralta, he tries to win the favour of her boss Geoffrey (guest star Chris Parnell). Meanwhile, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch needs Captain Holt's help with a job recommendation

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: Young Sheldon
