programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An old friend of Jessica's dies and the heir to a fortune, who has been missing for more than 20 years, makes a sudden reappearance claiming to have had amnesia. Angela Lansbury stars as the sleuthing crime writer

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A missing shoe discovered on the dead body of a homeless person leads Jessica to believe that the supposed accidental death was actually intentional. She poses as a wealthy widow to investigate the case of an accountant who apparently died as a result of alcoholism. Dirk Benedict guest stars alongside Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The spirit of old Salem comes to Cabot Cove as Jessica investigates strange happenings involving a woman who has been dead for three centuries. Guest starring Roddy McDowall and Dee Wallace Stone, with Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica jets off to attend a prestigious international literary conference in Moscow, where she is soon suspected of espionage. Guest starring David McCallum, with Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A breakdown leaves Jessica and a fellow writer stranded at a run-down desert motel, and it is not long before the amateur sleuth encounters murder, and the gruesome events are revealed through a series of black-and-white flashbacks. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: One of Jessica's former students publishes a best-selling novel, much to the excitement of the citizens of Cabot Cove - but their delight turns to dismay as fiction begins to mirror reality. Murder mystery, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits Montana to celebrate the publication of a dead fellow author's final novel and embarks on yet another murder investigation, forcing her to read between the lines to discover the identity of the culprit. Angela Lansbury stars, with Steve Forrest and Michael Learned of The Waltons fame

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is delighted to run into an old friend while on a shopping expedition in Boston - until he unaccountably denies knowing her. She recruits her dependable ally Harry McGraw to help solve the mystery. Jerry Orbach guest stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica takes time out from writing to visit her nephew - but soon has to put on her thinking cap to solve the murder of a TV sports personality. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury and Paul Sorvino

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Part one of two. Jessica receives a visit from Eudora McVeigh, a rival mystery writer with seemingly friendly intentions - but the discovery of a corpse in Cabot Cove leads her to suspect the woman of sinister motives. Starring Angela Lansbury and Jean Simmons

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Part two of two. As Seth lies critically ill in hospital, the doctor reveals he was poisoned, but Jessica suspects someone else was the intended victim and decides to confront Eudora. Jean Simmons guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A fugitive sex offender kidnaps his accuser, leading Detectives Benson and Stabler to question the man's dying mother to discover where he is heading. She believes her son is innocent and is merely trying to prove he is not guilty by forcing his 'victim' to go back on his lies. Starring Mariska Hargitay, Christopher Meloni and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Investigations reveal that the murder of a college student was linked to his role as pledgemaster of his fraternity, but Stabler and Benson are mystified when the murdered boy's father agrees to represent the accused. Drama, guest starring Serena Williams, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl is found murdered, and as detectives investigate the case, it is revealed she is involved in the same charitable foundation as four abduction victims. The scheme is run by a prominent physician who specialises in hormone replacement and perpetuating youth. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A recuperating rape victim is abducted from hospital and later found dead, triggering an investigation that takes Benson and the team into the heart of New York's clubland - and eventually to a suspect with a juvenile conviction for assault, torture and murder. Starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An assistant district attorney is kidnapped during an investigation into a home invasion that left four members of the same family murdered. However, a further killing prompts McCoy to put his career on the line to track down the culprits. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Annie Parisse

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Cassady try to solve the murder of a Muslim man at the hands of a white supremacist group, following a trail of clues that leads to the victim's cousin, who is seemingly connected to a terrorist cell operating in New York. With little evidence to go on, the detectives struggle to find enough information to close the case and stop a potential attack in the city. Crime drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Milena Govich

programme.title: Columbo: A Trace of Murder (1997)
programme.desc: A conniving woman yearns to divorce her husband and set up home with her lover - but a pre-nuptial agreement means she stands to lose out. Instead, she devises a cunning plan to nullify the contract, framing her unsuspecting spouse for the murder of a business rival. However, she reckons without the shabby sleuth's unfailing ability to uncover the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Shera Danese, Barry Corbin and David Rasche

programme.title: Columbo Likes the Nightlife (2003)
programme.desc: The disheveled cop is drawn into the world of the Los Angeles club scene when he investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter, and uncovers evidence of a blackmail plot. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Matthew Rhys and Jennifer Sky

programme.title: Columbo: An Exercise in Fatality (1974)
programme.desc: The owner of a chain of health clubs kills a business partner who was about to expose his crooked dealings. Making the death look like an unfortunate weightlifting accident, he cunningly creates the perfect alibi using a tape recording of his victim's voice - but he reckons without the intervention of the shabby sleuth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Conrad and Philip Bruns

programme.title: Columbo: Agenda for Murder (1990)
programme.desc: A crooked lawyer hopes to start a promising political career, but a former client he saved from prison threatens to blow the whistle on him. The attorney murders the blackmailer and makes it look like suicide - but the shabby sleuth sees through his ruse and sets out to expose the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Louis Zorich and Patrick McGoohan, who also directed

programme.title: Columbo: Butterfly in Shades of Grey (1993)
programme.desc: A radio presenter is plotting to sabotage his adopted daughter's plans to publish her first novel and kills one of his employees for trying to help her. He thinks he has the perfect alibi, claiming that the victim was murdered while they were talking to each other on the phone, and there is a tape recording to prove it - but his ruse fails to fool the dishevelled detective. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, William Shatner and Molly Hagan

programme.title: Columbo: Rest in Peace, Mrs Columbo (1990)
programme.desc: The wife of a criminal who died in prison swears revenge on the men she holds responsible for his incarceration - including Columbo. She kills one of her targets, and the shabby sleuth is assigned to the case. As she faces his well-honed approach to sniffing out a suspect, she plots to murder his wife. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Helen Shaver and Ian McShane

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team searches for a petty officer suspected of assault, who escapes when the van transporting him crashes into a lake. Torres works with a witness who heard vital evidence

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The discovery of an African boy's dismembered body leads the detectives to suspect he was killed by cultists as a ritual sacrifice - but subsequent investigations implicate a slave-trading ring operating from Nigeria. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Drama, guest starring Jane Seymour, with Mariska Hargitay and Christopher Meloni

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler race to find a woman with a high-risk pregnancy who has been kidnapped as the delivery date approaches. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson enlist the help of Dr Huang as they struggle to find a connection between a major pharmaceutical firm's illegal marketing campaign and the fatal shooting of two high-school students. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and BD Wong

programme.title: Law & Order

Crime drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Milena Govich

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore properties in Redhill in Surrey, Sittingbourne in Kent and Prenton in Liverpool before they are sold at auction. Later, the presenters meet the new owners - which includes a father and daughter team, a mother and her son and a pair of cousins - and find out what plans they have for the houses

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix

programme.title: Helicopter ER

Paramedics Pete and Matt straighten the man's shattered thighbone, but on the flight to hospital their patient takes a turn for the worse. In Leeds, a bus crashes into a hedge after the driver collapses at the wheel

programme.title: Helicopter ER

programme.title: Helicopter ER

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Orpington, south-east London, to meet hospital worker Jason Sulong, who was involved in a motorcycle accident that left him partially paralysed. Now he is unable to climb the stairs in his home and has difficulty accessing his bathroom and washing facilities, so designer Gabrielle Blackman teams up with the DIY SOS builders and other members of the local community to work to adapt his home to his needs over the course of just nine days

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Basildon, Essex, to meet nine-year-old Brandon, who suffers a severe form of epilepsy and can have up to 30 seizures a day. He requires 24-hour care and mum Jenny can't let him out of her sight for a moment - and to make matters worse, the family home simply isn't safe enough for the youngster. Luckily, the local tradesmen have heard of the family's plight and arrive in force to help Nick and the team transform the home, with designer Naomi Cleaver on hand to ensure they don't stray too far from her vision

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Swansea to meet 15-year-old Jack, who suffers from a rare form of muscular dystrophy that has led to a lifetime of painful operations. His mother Helen and older brother Daniel do all they can to help but as he grows it has become impossible to get him upstairs and now he has to sleep in the living room, leaving the rest of the family with nowhere to socialise. Having heard of their plight, the DIY SOS team turns up to transform their three-bedroom semi, backed up by an army of local tradespeople, with designer Gabrielle Blackman on hand to ensure they don't stray too far from her vision

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: In November 1983, Dennis Nilsen was sentenced at the Old Bailey to life imprisonment for killing six men and the attempted murders of two others. This docudrama examines the events that led him to become a serial killer, using witness testimony, detailed crime reports, forensic evidence and expert commentary by criminologists, detectives, pathologists and journalists

programme.title: The Force: Essex
programme.desc: The police's fight against knife crime in the county continues when a dispute between neighbours gets out of control

programme.title: The Force: Essex
programme.desc: Documentary shining a light on modern policing in the county of Essex and the challenges faced by officers as they deal with a range of criminal and social issues

programme.title: The Force: Essex
programme.desc: Officers are left mystified when the victim of an acid attack in Wickford refuses to cooperate with them

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: The Humberside team launches a dawn raid on a plush home and uncovers a cannabis farm, while officers visit the home of a woman banned from owning dogs after a puppy is spotted running around her back garden. Plus, the hunt is on for dealers who are suspected of selling dangerous counterfeit goods. Presented by Rav Wilding

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: Officers using a heat-seeking camera on the police helicopter suspect several sheds and outbuildings in a travellers' camp could be used for growing cannabis. The team also visits a disused park that has become a hang-out for teenagers and chases two supermarket shoplifters. Rav Wilding presents

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: The police investigate when a woman vanishes from her rented property, while the Riverside Neighbourhood Unit launches a dawn drugs raid. Plus, a new strategy is put into action to help get prostitutes off the street. Presented by Rav Wilding

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The zebra opens a restaurant, but encounters problems with missing food and a sleepy chef

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The zebra tries to discover who has been taking his vegetables

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Bertie and Zigby search for treasure, but discover a tasty surprise instead

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Zara loses her favourite doll at the beach so Zigby turns detective to find it

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Celine asks the cheeky zebra to look after her plant while she is away

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Stink argues with Tink and Wink so Zigby devises a plan to make them friends again

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar and Vic go in search of a magic sword, unaware that an evil warlord plans to steal it from them once they have it

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar challenges Sven to a fight, confident his invincible sword will guarantee him victory. However, Vic fears his father may be in over his head

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The vikings put on a play inspired by a story about the Norse gods Odin, Thor and Loki for a festival

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: A mob of berzerkers attack Flake and a rival village, and Vic tries to persuade the people of both communities to work together against their common foe

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The little Viking is stopped by sea traffic control while at the helm of the Drakkar, and is forced to take a test to prove he is capable of handling a ship

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Part one of two. A tornado sweeps up the Drakkar and takes it to China - where a general arrests the Vikings, demanding to know how they made their ship fly

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps a woman and her best friend search for properties along the North Yorkshire coast in Whitby, Filey and Scarborough, where their budget of £265,000 can buy them some impressive homes, which need to have enough room for a pet duck, goose and two chickens

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Chester to learn about an experiment to find out whether standing up a few more hours each day could have major health benefits. Gabriel Weston witnesses a womb transplant, Saleyha Ahsan shows how to stop someone choking and Chris van Tulleken finds out if vitamin supplements are important to wellbeing

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce looks into the past of Edinburgh's Palace of Holyroodhouse, which is located close to the dormant volcano Arthur's Seat. Events in the royal residence, one of the smallest palaces in Britain, have determined the futures of England, France and Scotland, and it was the last place in which a royal prince challenged the right of an English king to sit on the throne. Fiona also examines objects including the Darnley jewel, which features numerous hidden messages, and the needlework of a doomed queen

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Lunch Hour (1961)
programme.desc: A junior executive turns his mind to romance, and sets off for a night of passion after reserving a room at a hotel - only for his torrid plans to go awry when his short-term relationship with a designer takes an unexpected turn. Comedy, starring Robert Stephens, Shirley Anne Field, Michael Robbins and Nigel Davenport

programme.title: Far from the Madding Crowd (1967)
programme.desc: A beautiful woman arouses the ardour of three rival suitors in 19th-century rural Dorset and, having flirted and toyed with their affections, she chooses to marry a caddish, gambling soldier - a decision that leads to a sequence of harrowing events. John Schlesinger's adaptation of Thomas Hardy's classic novel, with Julie Christie, Alan Bates, Terence Stamp and Peter Finch

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: British house-hunters Ric and Nita Halstead, who are seeking a dream home in Miami, receive expert advice before buying. Amanda Lamb shows them round an art deco house, a Mediterranean-style villa and a Florida ranch

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Individuals take up the challenge to reinvent themselves completely

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Mike steadfastly resists a management attempt to make the staff wear identical uniforms, convinced it's a move designed to rob them of their individuality _ but a visit from Anne's surprisingly attractive mother soon diverts his attention to more personal matters. Comedy, starring Martin Freeman, Susan Earl and Ken Morley

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist is joined by Stereophonics frontman Kelly Jones, who discusses some of his favourite songs, including Otis Redding's Cigarettes and Coffee and Who Killed Davey Moore? by Bob Dylan

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: Fox
programme.desc: Drama following the lives of a London gangster and his family. Starring Peter Vaughan, Ray Winstone and Bernard Hill. Originally broadcast in 1980

programme.title: Damage (1992)
programme.desc: An English politician at the height of his career risks everything he holds dear when he gives in to his impulses and recklessly embarks on a passionate relationship with his son's girlfriend. When news of the affair reaches Whitehall, the fallout looks set to end his political ambitions. Drama, starring Jeremy Irons, Juliette Binoche, Rupert Graves, and Miranda Richardson

programme.title: Love, Honour and Obey (1999)
programme.desc: A humble courier manages to wheedle his way into the confidence of north London's toughest mobsters. Disappointed by the lack of action, he sets out to make things more interesting - but inadvertently sparks a bloody gangland conflict. Comedy thriller, starring Jude Law, Sadie Frost, Jonny Lee Miller, Ray Winstone, Rhys Ifans, Kathy Burke and Sean Pertwee

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: Two sisters are expelled from a nunnery and are plunged into a life of debauchery. While one embraces her new lifestyle, the other is desperate to cling to her old morality and sees a hope of salvation in a mysterious aristocrat who harbours a hidden dark side. Historical drama based on the novel Justine by the Marquis de Sade, starring Koo Stark and Martin Potter

programme.title: Ultimate Force
programme.desc: Armed Checkrein terrorists break into a pharmaceutical plant, taking hostages when the alarm is raised and the unit sealed off. Caroline volunteers to enter the premises and treat one of the employees after MI5 reveals the plant is working on a vaccine for a potent anthrax mutation. As time runs out, Red Troop is faced with a dilemma on which the lives of colleagues - and thousands of innocent civilians - depend. Ross Kemp and Alex Reid star

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours for locals and tourists, exploring Elephant & Castle and Croydon. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb helps a couple search for a dream holiday home on the Greek islands of Paros and Naxos, including a dwelling on the beach, a chic urban home and a beautiful farmhouse with seven stunning sun-terraces

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: McMeer eats all the mangos on the island, so Zigby and his friends set sail in search of more

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Everyone thinks a Bigfoot has stolen Lawrence's special shell when it disappears

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra and his friends take part in the Island Cup competition

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The zebra builds a robot to play with, but his new friend causes chaos

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra writes a play about a brave animal and a princess

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: McMeer causes trouble after getting caught in Zigby's giant kite

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Part two of two. The vikings' attempt to make it back to the coast is thwarted - but Vic helps them escape by coming up with a way to teach the general to fly

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The vikings visit a village that is supposedly being terrorised by a monster - and Vic meets a like-minded youngster who is determined to prove that the creature is not real

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Vic comes to the rescue of a princess, who is heading to a storytelling festival

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The crew encounters a sea monster while fishing for clams

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Tjure's laziness causes conflict to erupt between the men and women of the village, and only Vic can make sure everything gets back to normal

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Ylvi and Ylva get stranded on a ledge in the middle of a cliff, but Vic builds a trampoline to save them

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: A couple hope to swap the grime and grind of east London for a healthy life on the Pembrokeshire coast. Seetha Hallett shows them six properties in Tenby, Pembroke and the unique village of Saundersfoot, where rehearsals for the D-Day landings took place in 1943. But will their budget of £300,000 find a property big enough to accommodate the duo, some foster children and their grandmother?

programme.title: What Next? (1974)
programme.desc: A boy is knocked unconscious by a blow to the head, and when he comes round, he discovers he has gained the power to foretell when a crime is about to be committed. He uses his newfound abilities to help the police bring a criminal mastermind to justice. Children's fantasy adventure, starring Peter Robinson and Perry Benson

programme.title: The Slipper and the Rose (1976)
programme.desc: A girl is reduced to being the downtrodden servant of her cruel stepmother after her father's death. With a little help from her fairy godmother, she wins the heart of a handsome prince, who is desperately trying to avoid being forced into a political marriage by his parents. Musical version of Cinderella, starring Gemma Craven and Richard Chamberlain

programme.title: Dear Murderer (1947)
programme.desc: A man believes he has committed the perfect crime when he kills his wife's two lovers in a jealous rage. Melodrama, starring Eric Portman, Dennis Price, Jack Warner, Greta Gynt and Hazel Court

programme.title: Lunch Hour (1961)
programme.desc: A junior executive turns his mind to romance, and sets off for a night of passion after reserving a room at a hotel - only for his torrid plans to go awry when his short-term relationship with a designer takes an unexpected turn. Comedy, starring Robert Stephens, Shirley Anne Field, Michael Robbins and Nigel Davenport

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps a recently retired couple from the Home Counties find a property on Ireland's Donegal coast. They are shown around six homes, including a traditional farmhouse and a bungalow with views over the Atlantic

programme.title: Daddy Daycare
programme.desc: Three men are sent to work at a north-west London nursery, where father-of-four Grant receives a dressing down from manager Marion after losing his temper with the children. Paul is convinced childcare is easy and his partner Sally is eager for him to understand just how difficult it is, while recruitment consultant Tony's wife Marilyn hopes the experience will prompt him to spend less time working and watching sport and more time with his baby son

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Patients with a wide range of ailments are invited to attend the Food Hospital, where consultant surgeon Shaw Somers, dietitian Lucy Jones and GP Giovanni Miletto are among specialists aiming to discover if tailored nutritional programmes can help. Among those in need of assistance are a 24-year-old woman suffering from polycystic ovary syndrome, and a 44-year-old single father battling type 2 diabetes. Pixie McKenna also investigates the truth about superfoods and the programme features an experiment to see if chocolate can help combat high blood pressure

programme.title: The Best of Men
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about the birth of the Paralympics in 1948. Pioneering neurologist Dr Ludwig Guttmann arrives at Stoke Mandeville Hospital in Buckinghamshire and begins to transform the lives of his patients - Second World War servicemen with spinal cord injuries. He suggests using sport as a key part of their rehabilitation, and gets them involved in activities including wheelchair polo and basketball. Starring Eddie Marsan, Rob Brydon, George Mackay and Niamh Cusack

programme.title: Drive My Car
programme.desc: Short film parodying 1970s car adverts

programme.title: Love, Honour and Obey (1999)
programme.desc: A humble courier manages to wheedle his way into the confidence of north London's toughest mobsters. Disappointed by the lack of action, he sets out to make things more interesting - but inadvertently sparks a bloody gangland conflict. Comedy thriller, starring Jude Law, Sadie Frost, Jonny Lee Miller, Ray Winstone, Rhys Ifans, Kathy Burke and Sean Pertwee

programme.title: This That and the Other (1970)
programme.desc: Anthology of three comic tales. A fading movie star tries to seduce a producer, a suicidal loner is snapped out of his misery by a hippy, and a taxi driver suffers a blow to the head that leaves him experiencing erotic hallucinations. Comedy, starring Victor Spinetti, Dennis Waterman, Vanda Hudson and John Bird

programme.title: 198 Grand (2019)
programme.desc: Three hapless criminals from South London get mixed up in an underworld double-cross, and find themselves in possession of a large sum of money that puts their lives in danger. Crime drama, starring Andy Frith and Dean Kilbey

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Crystal Palace and Shoreditch. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Daddy Daycare
programme.desc: Three men are sent to work at a north-west London nursery, where father-of-four Grant receives a dressing down from manager Marion after losing his temper with the children. Paul is convinced childcare is easy and his partner Sally is eager for him to understand just how difficult it is, while recruitment consultant Tony's wife Marilyn hopes the experience will prompt him to spend less time working and watching sport and more time with his baby son

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps a recently retired couple from the Home Counties find a property on Ireland's Donegal coast. They are shown around six homes, including a traditional farmhouse and a bungalow with views over the Atlantic

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks above and alongside two large bodies of water - Ladybower Reservoir and Windermere

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series presented by Andrew White, featuring inspirational walks between 2-8 miles from around Britain

programme.title: Daddy Daycare
programme.desc: Three men are sent to work at a north-west London nursery, where father-of-four Grant receives a dressing down from manager Marion after losing his temper with the children. Paul is convinced childcare is easy and his partner Sally is eager for him to understand just how difficult it is, while recruitment consultant Tony's wife Marilyn hopes the experience will prompt him to spend less time working and watching sport and more time with his baby son

programme.title: The Cat Gang (1959)
programme.desc: A gang of children is always hanging around a harbour - although the customs officers are always trying to get rid of them. When the youngsters stumble on some shady characters behaving suspiciously, they end up uncovering a smuggling plot. Children's crime drama, starring Francesca Annis and John Pike

programme.title: Skid Kids (1953)
programme.desc: A group of kids takes on a gang of bike thieves, with a little help from the police. Children's drama, starring Barry MacGregor and Anthony Lang

programme.title: Three Steps in the Dark (1953)
programme.desc: A wealthy eccentric invites all the members of his family to his country house, so he can discuss the contents of his Will. However, when he is suddenly killed, everyone present is a suspect. Murder mystery, starring Greta Gynt and Hugh Sinclair

programme.title: Dear Murderer (1947)
programme.desc: A man believes he has committed the perfect crime when he kills his wife's two lovers in a jealous rage. Melodrama, starring Eric Portman, Dennis Price, Jack Warner, Greta Gynt and Hazel Court

programme.title: Far from the Madding Crowd (1967)
programme.desc: A beautiful woman arouses the ardour of three rival suitors in 19th-century rural Dorset and, having flirted and toyed with their affections, she chooses to marry a caddish, gambling soldier - a decision that leads to a sequence of harrowing events. John Schlesinger's adaptation of Thomas Hardy's classic novel, with Julie Christie, Alan Bates, Terence Stamp and Peter Finch

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps Wiltshire couple and pop opera fanatics Nikki Kedge and Angela Rawson find a bigger home in their dream location of Scotland's west coast. Desperate for more room to put on plays for local children, they view six houses in the county of Dumfries and Galloway - but will there be anything that tickles their fancy?

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Members of the British Resistance Movement recall 'the most vivid days' of their lives and Peter Williams tells the story of the Werewolves, the Nazi fanatics who tried to form a German underground resistance

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement men who parachuted with the SAS into France on D-Day and the massacre of 35 men in a French woodland

programme.title: What Music Means
programme.desc: Opera Holland Park invites a group of friend to discuss opera and explore how the people around the table had been affected by specific pieces of music during their lives

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Documentary exploring areas of the capital, beginning with Shooters Hill, Charlton, Greenwich and Blackheath

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Mike steadfastly resists a management attempt to make the staff wear identical uniforms, convinced it's a move designed to rob them of their individuality _ but a visit from Anne's surprisingly attractive mother soon diverts his attention to more personal matters. Comedy, starring Martin Freeman, Susan Earl and Ken Morley

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Sophie's Choice (1982)
programme.desc: A Polish Holocaust survivor tries to start afresh in 1940s New York, but is tormented by ghosts from her nightmarish past, leaving her desperately seeking solace in a stormy relationship with an unpredictable chemist. But all is not as it seems, as a new neighbour seems set to discover. Drama, starring an Oscar-winning Meryl Streep alongside Kevin Kline and Peter MacNicol

programme.title: Damage (1992)
programme.desc: An English politician at the height of his career risks everything he holds dear when he gives in to his impulses and recklessly embarks on a passionate relationship with his son's girlfriend. When news of the affair reaches Whitehall, the fallout looks set to end his political ambitions. Drama, starring Jeremy Irons, Juliette Binoche, Rupert Graves, and Miranda Richardson

programme.title: Black Gunn (1972)
programme.desc: A member of a black militant group carries out a robbery on a crime syndicate that ends in several deaths. When he is later murdered by the gangsters, his nightclub owner brother swears revenge. Crime thriller, starring Jim Brown and Martin Landau

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Members of the British Resistance Movement recall 'the most vivid days' of their lives and Peter Williams tells the story of the Werewolves, the Nazi fanatics who tried to form a German underground resistance

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Brixton and Harmondsworth for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.desc: A look back at Ponting's roots, revealing where his love of cricket came from and his earliest memories of the Ashes. programme.desc: Ricky talks through how he played and developed his signature shot, the pull, complete with demonstration in the indoor school at Lord's. programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Liverpool v Cardiff City. Action from the showpiece match at Wembley Stadium, where the winner of the first major trophy of the 2011/12 season was decided. The Reds had defeated the likes of Stoke City, Chelsea and Manchester City to reach the final and went into the match as clear favourites in their first visit to the national stadium since it was rebuilt. However, the Bluebirds, who defeated Crystal Palace on penalties in the semi-finals, had been in good form in the Championship and will have fancied their chances of producing an upset

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football
